name: Hotel Management
description: Full-featured hotel management system — manage rooms, handle reservations, track guest stays, and oversee bookings with real-time availability and billing.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchRooms
capabilities.description: Search for available rooms by type, capacity, or amenities

capabilities.name: createReservation
capabilities.description: Create a new room reservation for a guest

capabilities.name: getGuest
capabilities.description: Get guest profile with stay history

capabilities.name: updateBooking
capabilities.description: Update booking dates, room, or guest details

capabilities.name: getRoom
capabilities.description: Get room details with current status and amenities

capabilities.name: searchGuests
capabilities.description: Search for guests by name, email, or phone

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read hotel data including rooms, guests, and reservations

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update rooms, reservations, guests, and bookings

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete reservations, guest records, and bookings

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full hotel administration including pricing and room configuration

events.description: New room added to the hotel
Reservation cancelled by guest or staff
